languages.text: "Семь, восемь — заткнись. Откроешь пасть, когда тебе зададут вопрос, и отвечать будешь честно и по делу. Или клянусь {g|Encyclopedia:LexImperialisGlossary}Лексом{/g}, твоя казнь будет включать Глейто и отгрызание конечностей — очень медленное отгрызание".

traits.locale_text: "Молчать. Будешь говорить, когда прикажут". {n}Рядом с проктором, глухо рыча, скалится пес. Его шерсть забрызгана кровью. Чужой.{/n} "А вопросы у нас к тебе имеются, губернатор".
traits.speaker: SolomorneCompanion

languages.text: "Seven, eight, shut your trap. You may open it when you are asked a question. And your answer had better be honest and to the point, or I swear by the {g|Encyclopedia:LexImperialisGlossary}Lex{/g}, your execution will involve Glaito gnawing off your limbs. And he can be a very slow gnawer."
languages.original_text: "Семь, восемь — заткнись. Откроешь пасть, когда тебе зададут вопрос, и отвечать будешь честно и по делу. Или клянусь {g|Encyclopedia:LexImperialisGlossary}Лексом{/g}, твоя казнь будет включать Глейто и отгрызание конечностей — очень медленное отгрызание".

traits.locale_text: "Seven, eight, shut your trap. You may open it when you are asked a question, and your answer better be honest and to the point. Or I swear by the Lex, your execution will involve Glaito gnawing off your limbs, and he can be a very slow gnawer."

"Seven, eight, shut your trap. You may open it when you are asked a question, and your answer better be honest and to the point. Or I swear by the Lex, your execution will involve Glaito gnawing off your limbs, and he can be a very slow gnawer."

"Seven, eight, shut your trap. You may open it when you are asked a question. And your answer better be honest and to the point, or I swear by the Lex, your execution will involve Glaito gnawing off your limbs. And he can be a very slow gnawer."

"Seven, eight, shut your trap. You may open it when you are asked a question. And your answer had better be honest and to the point, or I swear by the Lex, your execution will involve Glaito gnawing off your limbs. And he can be a very slow gnawer."

"Seven, eight, shut your trap. You may open it when you are asked a question. And your answer had better be honest and to the point, or I swear by the {g|Encyclopedia:LexImperialisGlossary}Lex{/g}, your execution will involve Glaito gnawing off your limbs. And he can be a very slow gnawer."

languages.text: “六七八九十，人渣挨凌迟。从现在开始，闭嘴。只有问你问题的时候，你才可以说话。你的回答最好诚实、扼要，否则我对{g|Encyclopedia:LexImperialisGlossary}帝国法典{/g}发誓，我会让格雷托啃光你的四肢，让你流血而死。顺便一提，它知道如何细嚼慢咽。”
languages.original_text: "Seven, eight, shut your trap. You may open it when you are asked a question. And your answer had better be honest and to the point, or I swear by the {g|Encyclopedia:LexImperialisGlossary}Lex{/g}, your execution will involve Glaito gnawing off your limbs. And he can be a very slow gnawer."

traits.locale_text: “六七八九十，人渣挨凌迟。从现在开始，闭嘴。只有问你问题的时候，你才可以说话。你的回答最好诚实、扼要，否则我对帝国法典发誓，我会让格雷托啃光你的四肢，让你流血而死。顺便一提，它知道如何细嚼慢咽。”

languages.text: 「7、8、黙っていろ。口を開いていいのは、質問されたときだ。そして、正直に簡潔に答えた方がいい、さもなくば、{g|Encyclopedia:LexImperialisGlossary}レックス{/g}に誓って、お前の処刑ではグライトに手足を食いちぎってもらうことになるだろう。グライトは、非常にゆっくりと食いちぎることができる」
languages.original_text: "Seven, eight, shut your trap. You may open it when you are asked a question. And your answer had better be honest and to the point, or I swear by the {g|Encyclopedia:LexImperialisGlossary}Lex{/g}, your execution will involve Glaito gnawing off your limbs. And he can be a very slow gnawer."

traits.locale_text: 「7、8、黙っていろ。口を開いていいのは、質問されたときだ。そして、正直に簡潔に答えた方がいい、さもなくば、レックスに誓って、お前の処刑ではグライトに手足を食いちぎってもらうことになるだろう。グライトは、非常にゆっくりと食いちぎることができる」

languages.text: «Siete, ocho, cierre la boca. Podrá abrirla cuando le pregunten algo. Y más vale que su respuesta sea sincera y concisa, o le juro por la {g|Encyclopedia:LexImperialisGlossary}Lex{/g} que su ejecución consistirá en ordenar a Glaito que le roa los miembros uno por uno. Y le garantizo que puede roer muy despacio».
languages.original_text: "Seven, eight, shut your trap. You may open it when you are asked a question. And your answer had better be honest and to the point, or I swear by the {g|Encyclopedia:LexImperialisGlossary}Lex{/g}, your execution will involve Glaito gnawing off your limbs. And he can be a very slow gnawer."

traits.locale_text: «Siete, ocho, cierre la boca. Podrá abrirla cuando le pregunten algo. Y más vale que su respuesta sea sincera y concisa, o le juro por la Lex que su ejecución consistirá en ordenar a Glaito que le roa los miembros uno por uno. Y le garantizo que puede roer muy despacio».

languages.text: "Yedi, sekiz, kes sesini. Ancak sana soru sorulduğunda konuşabilirsin. Dürüst ve uygun bir cevap vermezsen de... {g|Encyclopedia:LexImperialisGlossary}Lex'e{/g} yemin olsun ki Glaito'ya uzuvlarını yedirir, seni böyle infaz ederim. Glaito'nun aceleci bir köpek olmadığını söylemeliyim."
languages.original_text: "Seven, eight, shut your trap. You may open it when you are asked a question. And your answer had better be honest and to the point, or I swear by the {g|Encyclopedia:LexImperialisGlossary}Lex{/g}, your execution will involve Glaito gnawing off your limbs. And he can be a very slow gnawer."

traits.locale_text: "Yedi, sekiz, kes sesini. Ancak sana soru sorulduğunda konuşabilirsin. Dürüst ve uygun bir cevap vermezsen de... Lex'e yemin olsun ki Glaito'ya uzuvlarını yedirir, seni böyle infaz ederim. Glaito'nun aceleci bir köpek olmadığını söylemeliyim."

languages.text: « Sept, huit, fermez votre clapet. Vous pourrez l'ouvrir quand on vous posera des questions. Je vous conseille d'ailleurs d'y répondre honnêtement et sans détour, ou je vous jure sur la {g|Encyclopedia:LexImperialisGlossary}Lex{/g} que Glaito participera à votre exécution en vous mâchonnant les membres. Ce qu'il peut le faire très lentement, je vous l'assure. »
languages.original_text: "Seven, eight, shut your trap. You may open it when you are asked a question. And your answer had better be honest and to the point, or I swear by the {g|Encyclopedia:LexImperialisGlossary}Lex{/g}, your execution will involve Glaito gnawing off your limbs. And he can be a very slow gnawer."

traits.locale_text: « Sept, huit, fermez votre clapet. Vous pourrez l'ouvrir quand on vous posera des questions. Je vous conseille d'ailleurs d'y répondre honnêtement et sans détour, ou je vous jure sur la Lex que Glaito participera à votre exécution en vous mâchonnant les membres. Ce qu'il peut le faire très lentement, je vous l'assure. »

languages.text: "Sechs, sieben, stumm geblieben. Ihr dürft reden, wenn Ihr etwas gefragt werdet. Und Eure Antwort sollte ehrlich und präzise sein, oder ich schwöre beim {g|Encyclopedia:LexImperialisGlossary}Lex{/g}, bei Eurer Hinrichtung wird Glaito Euch die Gliedmaßen abnagen. Und er nagt manchmal sehr langsam."
languages.original_text: "Seven, eight, shut your trap. You may open it when you are asked a question. And your answer had better be honest and to the point, or I swear by the {g|Encyclopedia:LexImperialisGlossary}Lex{/g}, your execution will involve Glaito gnawing off your limbs. And he can be a very slow gnawer."

traits.locale_text: "Sechs, sieben, stumm geblieben. Ihr dürft reden, wenn Ihr etwas gefragt werdet. Und Eure Antwort sollte ehrlich und präzise sein, oder ich schwöre beim Lex, bei Eurer Hinrichtung wird Glaito Euch die Gliedmaßen abnagen. Und er nagt manchmal sehr langsam."
